---
title: "Blog"
page-layout: full
body-classes: page-blog
listing:
  contents: posts/*.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: custom
  template: templates/blog-battle-listing.ejs.md
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [image, title, date, description, battle-name, battle-label, battle-quote]
  categories: false
---
